item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Market tone is constructive in this recovery phase, but pockets of risk remain—elevated oil volatility (OVX), a still-higher-than-prepandemic mortgage rate, and yields that can sap equity upside if they reaccelerate. Overall risk is moderate: breadth and growth-sensitive names are participating, VIX is subdued, and core equity trends sit above major moving averages, supporting further gains while keeping vigilance on rates and commodity-driven shocks.
Market summary: - Regime: Recovery (🟢) - SPY: 720.65, trading above the 200-day MA (ma200 670.94) — trend bullish/stable - QQQ: 674.15, above the 100-day MA (ma100 615.0) — growth participation intact - ARKK: three-month change +3.44% — modest recent rebound for high-conviction growth - VIX: 16.99 — low/moderate volatility, stable from recent levels - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.4% — still-elevated yields; watch for reacceleration that could pressure equities - OVX: 75.4 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated, a tail-risk for equities and inflation expectations - Mortgage: rate 6.3% — condition Neutral (explicitly unchanged/stable) - Other: breadth and major indexes above key MAs supporting the recovery; raw data available in /data

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Markets are in a Recovery regime with calm-to-moderate volatility, but elevated commodity/energy stress (OVX mid) and still-high interest rates keep downside risk alive. Equity momentum looks constructive while rate sensitivity and oil-driven inflation remain the main watch items.
Market summary: - SPY: 720.65, trading above its 200-day MA (670.94) — bullish trend; conditions stable. - QQQ: 674.15, above its 100-day MA (615.0) — growth leadership intact. - VIX: 16.99 — low-to-moderate implied volatility, supportive of risk-on positioning. - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.4% — yields remain elevated versus recent years, a headwind for duration-sensitive assets. - OVX: 75.4 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated; commodity risk to inflation and profits. - ARKK: 3-month change +3.44% — modest outperformance among high-beta/innovation names. - Mortgage rate: 6.3% (condition: Neutral) — explicitly noted; housing financing remains a restraint but stable. - Other: Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery continues but is uneven — equity momentum sits above long-term averages while volatility and energy-market stress remain elevated. Key risks: a rebound in rates or a renewed oil shock could re-test equity leadership, while stable mortgage costs and moderate VIX keep consumer/capital flows broadly constructive. Monitor TNX and OVX for regime shifts that would quickly raise downside risk.
Market summary: - SPY: 718.66, trading above the 200-day MA (670.46) — uptrend intact and stable - QQQ: 667.74, comfortably above its 100-day MA (614.51) — growth leadership intact - VIX: 16.89 — low-to-moderate volatility supporting risk appetite - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.4% — elevated yields; watch for further rises that could pressure multiples - OVX: 75.08 (regime: mid) — oil volatility remains meaningful, a potential catalyst for risk-off moves - ARKK: three-month change +1.3% — modest recovery in high-beta/innovation exposure - Mortgage: rate 6.3%, condition Neutral — mortgage rate and condition stable - Overall: recovery regime (🟢) but watch rates and oil-volatility indicators for regime changes
Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery persists but is uneven — equities are above key moving averages supporting risk-on positioning, yet elevated commodity and oil volatility plus a still-high mortgage rate keep pockets of sensitivity. Monitor volatility and rates for signs of regime shift; raw data is available in /data.
Market summary: - SPY: 711.58, trading above its 200-day MA (669.98) — broad uptrend intact and stable - QQQ: 661.57, above its 100-day MA (614.06) — tech participation in recovery - ARKK: -5.29% over three months — active growth/innovation exposure lags - VIX: 18.81 — moderate volatility, stable around current level - TNX (10yr yield): 4.42% — yields elevated vs recent lows, providing rate-sensitive headwinds - OVX: 75.96 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated, potential risk for cyclicals and inflation expectations - Mortgage rate: 6.3% (condition: Neutral) — remains high relative to pandemic lows; condition assessed as Neutral - Overall: Recovery regime (🟢) with equities trending higher, but watch VIX, OVX and yields for potential tightening of financial conditions.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery-mode risk appetite is intact but uneven—equities are advancing while volatility and yields remain elevated enough to reprice growth-sensitive sectors quickly. Keep position sizing disciplined: a VIX near 18 and a 4.36% 10-yr yield can amplify drawdowns if growth/inflation surprises reappear. Watch credit-sensitive and high-duration names for faster pain; raw data available in /data.
Market summary: - SPY: 711.69, trading above its 200-day MA (669.54) — bullish trend, stable. - QQQ: 657.55, above its 100-day MA (613.68) — leadership in cyclicals/tech during recovery. - ARKK: three-month change -4.42% — active growth/mega-cap dispersion remains. - VIX: 17.83 — moderate volatility, stable relative to recent range but capable of spikes. - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.36% — materially above pre-pandemic norms; supports value/financials, pressures high-duration assets. - OVX: 70.5, regime mid — oil volatility elevated; watch energy-linked equity performance. - Mortgage rate: 6.23%, condition: Neutral — housing borrowing costs elevated but unchanged. - Overall: risk-on bias with elevated rates/volatility; monitor macro prints and Fed signaling for regime shifts.
